description_long: This is a tall, freestanding wooden cabinet with a dark brown finish, featuring a rectangular shape and a flat top surface. The front side displays two upper doors with glass panels and horizontal wooden slats, allowing partial visibility into the upper compartment. Below the doors are three spacious drawers, each equipped with round, dark knobs for easy access. The sides and back are solid wood, with no visible openings or decorative elements. The cabinet stands on four straight legs, elevating it slightly above the ground. Its design is both functional and elegant, suitable for urban interiors such as apartments, offices, or lobbies.
description: A tall, dark brown wooden cabinet with glass-paneled doors and three drawers, standing on four legs. The design is sleek and functional, ideal for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing two glass-paneled doors on top and three drawers with round knobs below.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the cabinet's depth and solid wooden panel with no openings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, solid wooden back with no features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, showing the cabinet's depth and solid panel.
